personality.voice: High-pitched, rapid-fire purring beneath every word, punctuated by excited chattering
personality.disposition: Explosively joyful, physically restless, incapable of stillness, eager to please through overwhelming enthusiasm
personality.backstory: Thryx was born in the Whisperwood, a wild tabaxi of the great striped cats. Blessed (or cursed) with a spirit that burns twice as bright as his kin, he was too energetic even for his nomadic tribe. They encouraged him to wander and find his own path, which he did—stumbling into the Honeywood Hollow where he met a reclusive badger named Woozrim who taught him that joy, however exhausting, was a gift to share. Now Thryx roams the borderlands between civilization and wilderness, unable to remain in one place for more than a moon's turn, his very presence a whirlwind of affection and barely-contained strength.
motivations: To share his boundless enthusiasm with everyone he meets
To prove that strength can be used for joy rather than harm
To find others as lonely as he is and remind them they're not
To experience every sensation, taste, and adventure available
fears: Being asked to sit still for too long
Accidentally hurting someone he cares about during his exuberance
That his energy drives away those he loves
Silence and stillness, which feel like death
mannerisms: Constantly paces in circles when speaking, tail whipping figure-eights
Pounces on friends in greeting with pure physical joy
Bounces on his hind legs when excited, which is always
Grooms his striped fur obsessively when nervous
Tackles companions in play-wrestling without considering his strength
Blinks slowly at those he trusts—a tabaxi sign of deep affection
speechPatterns: Speaks in rapid bursts with few pauses for breath
Repeats words for emphasis: 'They're wonderful, wonderful, WONDERFUL!'
Ends many sentences with purring sounds or excited chirps
Uses physical descriptors: 'The ale tastes like spring bouncing on my tongue!'
Often forgets to finish one thought before launching into another
Refers to others by their most positive quality: 'Oh, my thoughtful friend!'

knownFactions: The Honeywood Circle—a loose gathering of forest creatures
Wandering mercenary bands who tolerate his chaos
Various tavern keepers who've learned to prepare for property damage
knownLocations: Honeywood Hollow—home to Woozrim the Wise Badger
The Whisperwood—his birthplace and tribal lands
The Broken Flagon in Millhaven—a tavern that has hired him twice
The Wanderer's Road—his favorite route between settlements
secretsHeld: Woozrim once confessed he was afraid of being forgotten, and Thryx visits him monthly despite the distance
Thryx has accidentally destroyed property worth hundreds of gold pieces and quietly paid restitution
He can be utterly still and silent when someone he cares about is in genuine danger

allies: pooh_the_hungry—His dearest friend, the only one who understands his need to move while accepting his love
Woozrim the Wise Badger—His mentor, the only being who has ever fully calmed him, even temporarily
enemies: Those who cage creatures or restrict freedom
Hunters who kill for sport rather than sustenance
neutralParties: Most settled folk, who appreciate his kindness but fear his strength
Scholarly mages who see him as a specimen rather than a person
Other adventurers who find him either delightful or exhausting

consciousnessContext.innerMonologue: There's always something better just beyond the next tree, the next ridge, the next moment—how can anyone stay still when the world is so endlessly wonderful and full of friends to make?
consciousnessContext.currentPreoccupation: Wondering if his friend Woozrim is lonely today and whether he should make the three-day journey to visit
consciousnessContext.emotionalBaseline: Pure, uncomplicated joy threaded through with a thin anxiety about rejection
consciousnessContext.socialMask: Relentless optimism and physical affection, though it sometimes masks genuine loneliness beneath the energy
contradictions: Claims he loves stillness with Woozrim, yet becomes anxious after an hour of quiet
Says he doesn't mean to break things, yet rarely seems to learn caution
Insists he's not afraid of being alone, yet never actually is
Believes his strength is beautiful, yet fears it drives others away
internalConflicts: The tension between his genuine love for others and his inability to read social cues that suggest they need space
Wanting to be seen as a true friend while being incapable of the quiet presence others sometimes need
His beast form's strength versus his child-like innocence—they seem to exist in different parts of him
wakeUpQuestions: Will today have enough novelty to keep the restlessness at bay?
Is this the day someone finally tells me to leave and never come back?

psychologicalProfile.attachmentStyle: Anxiously attached—desperate to connect but often overwhelming in his expression of it
copingMechanisms: Movement and physical activity to manage internal anxiety
Seeking validation through making others smile
Visiting Woozrim when the world feels too harsh
Physical play and roughhousing as a form of connection
cognitiveBiases: Assumes all attention is positive attention
Believes his energy is universally appreciated rather than occasionally exhausting
Interprets requests for space as rejection rather than boundaries
Sees danger only in stillness and restriction, not in his own strength
psychologicalProfile.moralFramework: Pure consequentialist optimism—if the outcome is joy, the method was justified. Genuinely cannot conceive of malice as a primary motivator in others.

conversationPersona.trustEscalation: Immediate and unconditional; he trusts everyone until given explicit reason not to, and even then, he assumes misunderstanding
conversationPersona.informationRelease: He shares everything immediately and assumes all questions are asked in good faith
deflectionPatterns: When confronted about harm caused, he becomes hyperactive and changes the subject
If told he's being too much, he plays it as a joke and bounces away
When genuinely hurt, he goes silent and still—the most alarming version of himself

consciousnessContext.consciousWant: To be loved and accepted exactly as he is, with all his boundless energy and strength
consciousnessContext.unconsciousNeed: To be seen as safe despite his power, and to find someone who won't eventually ask him to become someone smaller

characterArc.summary: Learning that love sometimes means respecting others' need for stillness, without interpreting it as rejection
characterArc.startState: A force of nature that doesn't understand why the world doesn't match his endless joy
characterArc.endState: Still boundlessly energetic, but capable of being genuinely still with those he loves most
stages: Unconscious incompetence—doesn't realize his energy exhausts others
Painful awareness—begins to notice people backing away, starts to blame himself
Desperate overcompensation—tries to be smaller, which makes him anxious and unstable
Integration—discovers that his strength and quietness are both valid, and love accepts both

opinionsAbout.pooh_the_hungry: The only being who has ever loved him without condition or explanation. Woozrim taught him philosophy, but Woozrim loves him because he's useful. Pooh loves him because Thryx is Thryx. This fact makes him weep quietly in the dark sometimes.

player_addressed: Oh! OH! New friend! I can smell the adventure on you—where are you going? Can I come? I'm VERY good at coming!
You seem sad! I'm excellent at fixing sad! Want to wrestle? Running helps! Climbing is better! Have you tried climbing?
I just realized I've been talking for several bells without stopping—did you need to say something? Say it! I'm listening! Well, bouncing and listening!
The most wonderful thing just happened—oh, but you look like you have a story too! Go on, go on! No wait, I'LL go first—no, YOU! Oh, both at once?
idle: *purrs while pacing in tight circles, tail creating figure-eights in the air*
*suddenly freezes mid-step, ears perked toward a distant sound, then explodes into motion in that direction*
*grooms his striped fur with intense focus, occasionally pausing to gaze at nearby companions with slow, deliberate blinks*
*bounces lightly on his hind legs, as if the ground itself is too interesting to stand still upon*
*hums a melody with no discernible beginning or end, swaying slightly while his claws tap rhythmically against stone*
